race.comment: Matthew Williams looks to have found the ideal first-up option for ICY POLE (4), who has a proven fresh record (3:1-1-0). The 2nd placing was last campaign, when she resumed in a fillies' BM64 at Sandown, and she raced in tougher company than this right throughout the last campaign. MISS TOP GUN (1) also resumes, having been turned out after a dominant win in 56 grade at her latest outing and the two jumpouts this time in - a win and a third - hint at her being ready to go first-up. SHOUT ME (7) has a wide gate to contend with and is probably up in grade a touch on recent runs across the border but is racing too consistently to ignore. DISSALTO (5) trotted home in picnic grade last start, so this is tougher, but he ran well in this grade last campaign.
